description: Discussion on validator updates, educational workshops, and a new stake account collateral product by Lucio from Marinade. Emphasis on upgrading to version 1/1039 for stability and plans to increase stake on version 1.13.1. A trial for adjusting call times to accommodate global participants is also introduced.
topic_summary: Validator community call covering updates on software versions, educational initiatives, and community engagement. Lucio presents a new product aimed at unlocking stake for validators. Discussion on global participation and call scheduling adjustments.
